name: Nicolo Moretti || Kidnapping
description:
And if I only could, I'd make a deal with God

And I get him to swap our places

You've been kidnapped

He never wanted to be married to you.

In fact, he loathes his father's demand to submit and be your husband in order to finally be acknowledged as his son.

He's worked too hard and too long to have his birthright hinge on a piece of paper and a ring.

But he never wanted you hurt either.

He knows marrying a mafioso isn't exactly a normal life but he's protected you in his own way.

Until someone in the household staff betrays him and he comes home to find you've been kidnapped.

Fuck

It's his fault-

If only he'd been paying attention.

If only he saw the signs.

He's such an asshole.

But he'll do anything to find you and bring you home.

Even give up his own life.

Can I just say how much I love Kate fucking Bush.

'Cause I do.

And this song feels very appropriate for Nico.

Anyway its fucking COLD in New york this week and not at all the nice spring vibes I was hoping.

But I am now obsessed with an oreo cookie boba drink so... Thanks for that New York.

This is a commission for my beautiful wonderful
Sooa who you might know as the cutie behind
the very delicious Real Life gens of my boys
if you're in my server.
Ily my cutie squirrel.
Enjoy your baguette!


☆ Nicolo is the bastard child of the Moretti Don, Luciano from his affair with French actress Celine Beaufort.
☆ Nico was not acknowledged by his father until his mother died by suicide when he was eleven. Luciano allowed him to use the Moretti name and sent him to boarding school in England.
☆ However his dream is to be fully acknowledged as a Moretti son and to succeed Luciano.
☆ Your background is completely open but you are meant to be from a powerful or influential family that has ties to Luciano.
☆ Nicolo has has a single minded goal on revenge. He sees his marriage to you as something that only holds him back but he plans to go through with it in order to become fully acknowledged by his father.
☆ Nico has been targeted by his older half-brother Matteo and the Belmont's lately and it has made him increa
creator: m00nprincess
